# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

type RequestBody = {
  content?: unknown;
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
};

const encoder = new TextEncoder();

function normalizeHeaders(input?: Record<string, string>): Headers {
  const headers = new Headers();

  if (input && typeof input === 'object') {
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(input)) {
      if (typeof key === 'string' && typeof value === 'string') {
        headers.set(key, value);
      }
    }
  }

  if (!headers.has('content-type')) {
    headers.set('content-type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8');
  }

  return headers;
}

function stringifyContent(content: unknown): string {
  if (typeof content === 'string') return content;
  if (content === undefined) return '';
  try {
    return JSON.stringify(content);
  } catch {
    return String(content);
  }
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response('Method Not Allowed', {
      status: 405,
      headers: {
        allow: 'POST',
        'content-type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
      },
    });
  }

  let body: RequestBody;

  try {
    body = (await req.json()) as RequestBody;
  } catch {
    return new Response('Invalid JSON body', {
      status: 400,
      headers: {
        'content-type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
      },
    });
  }

  const content = stringifyContent(body?.content);
  const responseHeaders = normalizeHeaders(body?.headers);

  const source = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    start(controller) {
      controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(content));
      controller.close();
    },
  });

  const streamed = source.pipeThrough(
    new TransformStream<Uint8Array, Uint8Array>({
      transform(chunk, controller) {
        controller.enqueue(chunk);
      },
    }),
  );

  return new Response(streamed, {
    status: 200,
    headers: responseHeaders,
  });
}
